_comment: SKUs the daily routine watches for competitor pricing. ebayQuery = the search string to use on eBay sold listings. shopifyHandle = the Shopify product URL handle (null if not yet listed). targetPriceAUD = HOKO target/current price per unit (null if not listed). lastUpdated = date this entry was last reviewed.
